overview.description: The AltShares Event-Driven ETF (EVNT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides long and short exposure to equity and debt securities of companies believed to be impacted by an announced or anticipated corporate event. EVNT was launched on Dec 31, 2014 and is issued by Altshares.
